purpose: Robustness only. These variants cannot be selected as a new optimum and cannot change the frozen 0.25 ATR or 33.333% definitions.
interaction_grid: All 3x3 combinations are reported as a stability surface; no best cell may be promoted.
required_reporting: trades, expectancy, net R, drawdown, return/DD and two-tick expectancy for every cell
calendar-year net R for every cell
minimum and maximum results across the surface
whether the sign and economic direction are stable around the frozen thresholds
